failures.description: The agent answered "No" despite the tool evidence showing the deck material is plastic.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The goal was to answer whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3 explicitly returned one item whose options include "deck material": "plastic". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the necessary evidence was available and was misread or mishandled.
